Findings.Title: Subscription has no resource locks configured
Findings.Detail: Subscription 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001 does not have any resource locks. Critical resources should be protected with CanNotDelete or ReadOnly locks.
Findings.Remediation: Add resource locks to critical resources using the Azure Portal or New-AzResourceLock cmdlet.

Findings.Title: Management group has orphaned custom policy definitions
Findings.Detail: Found 3 orphaned custom policy definitions at the Tenant Root Group that are not assigned to any scope. Unused policies should be cleaned up to reduce management overhead.
Findings.Remediation: Review and remove orphaned custom policy definitions that are no longer in use.

Findings.Title: Resource diagnostics settings configured
Findings.Remediation: Enable diagnostic settings to route logs and metrics to an approved destination.

Findings.Title: Resource missing required tags
Findings.Remediation: Apply required governance tags according to your tagging policy.

Findings.Title: Policy compliance state: Deny public IP on workloads
